diff --git a/packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts b/packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts

--- a/packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts

@@ -1,385 +1,44 @@
-import { execFile } from "node:child_process"
-import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"
-import { BrowserWindow, Notification, app, clipboard, dialog, ipcMain, shell } from "electron"
-import type { IpcMainEvent, IpcMainInvokeEvent } from "electron"
-import type { DesktopMenuAction } from "@opencode-ai/app/desktop-menu"
+/**
+ * IPC handler registry — thin composer.
+ *
+ * Delegates to focused sub-modules. Each sub-module owns a concern
+ * group and exports its own register*IpcHandlers() function.
+ *
+ * Sub-modules:
+ *   ipc-init      — deps delegation (init flow, server, updater, etc.)
+ *   ipc-session   — session import / export via dialog
+ *   ipc-store     — generic electron-store CRUD

diff --git a/packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts b/packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts
index 788b8cf38..814ccd06b 100644
--- a/packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts
+++ b/packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts
@@ -1,385 +1,47 @@
-import { execFile } from "node:child_process"
-import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"
-import { BrowserWindow, Notification, app, clipboard, dialog, ipcMain, shell } from "electron"
-import type { IpcMainEvent, IpcMainInvokeEvent } from "electron"
-import type { DesktopMenuAction } from "@opencode-ai/app/desktop-menu"
+/**
+ * IPC handler registry — thin composer.
+ *
+ * Delegates to focused sub-modules. Each sub-module owns a concern
+ * group and exports its own register*IpcHandlers() function.
+ *
+ * Sub-modules:
+ *   ipc-init      — deps delegation (init flow, server, updater, etc.)
+ *   ipc-session   — session import / export via dialog
+ *   ipc-store     — generic electron-store CRUD
